subcodes.first_line: Thou seest, O my God, how the Beloved of the world is in the hands of them that have veiled themselves from Thee, and how He is subject to the oppressors
subcodes.first_line_orig: تری یا الهی محبوب الامکان بین ایدی المحتجبین و المظلوم بین ایدی الظالمین قد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for protection, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
